responsibilities: Conducted certification testing for enterprise servers using VMware and Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) tools, ensuring compliance with industry standards.
Executed test cases based on detailed test plans, validating system performance, compatibility, and functionality.
Collected, analyzed, and documented test results and logs, providing comprehensive reports to Red Hat Enterprise (RHEL), VMware, and NVIDIA for validation.
Maintained detailed test documentation, ensuring traceability and compliance with certification requirements.
Assisted in automating test procedures to improve efficiency and accuracy in the certification process.
Conducted functional and regression testing of NetBackup's NAS and SAN storage protection across multiple arrays, including NetApp, Isilon, Hitachi, EMC Unity, EMC PowerMax, and Pure Storage.
Developed and executed automation scripts using Python, Selenium, PyTest to validate storage integration workflows.
Validated and enhanced plug-in code for different storage arrays to support Multi-Volume, Consistency Group, and Volume Group operations.
Performed extensive testing on snapshot-based replication to verify data integrity, failover handling, and recovery performance.
Designed, documented, and executed test plans and test cases in alignment with SDLC/STLC practices and Agile Scrum methodology.
Performed REST API testing to validate backup, replication, and recovery endpoints for storage workflows.
Identified and reported defects, collaborated with developers to troubleshoot complex issues, and ensured timely resolution.
Analyzed system logs and performance metrics to assess backup efficiency, replication reliability, and storage compatibility.
Testbed Preparation & Configuration – Set up and configure test environments based on specific test requirements to validate Flex Appliance functionalities.
Functional & Regression Testing – Executed test cases to verify MSDP, Advanced Disk, Lockdown Mode, and Recovery Storage Data features, ensuring stability and performance.
Defect Tracking & Reporting – Identified, reported, and monitored defects using bug-tracking tools, collaborating closely with development teams for resolution.
Test Automation & Documentation – Developed and maintained test scripts using python for new feature enhancements, ensuring efficient validation of functionalities.
Performance & Scalability Testing – Validated the appliance's ability to handle concurrent storage operations, ensuring optimal resource utilization and system resilience.

education.institution: Sir M. Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology
